ui_click.description: A soft wooden button click for a cozy hand-painted fishing idle game UI, gentle tactile tap, light bamboo or carved wood, warm and natural, very short, no electronic beep, no arcade sound.

ui_error.description: A restrained invalid action sound for a calm cozy fishing game UI, soft dull wooden knock with a tiny muted rattle, polite feedback, not alarming, no buzzer, no synthetic tone.

cast.description: Natural fishing rod cast in a quiet winter riverside scene, line whipping softly through cold air, light reel movement, subtle clothing rustle, realistic Foley, calm and delicate, no music.

bobber_splash.description: Small fishing bobber landing in a cold quiet river, gentle plop and tiny water ripples, crisp winter air, natural close Foley, soft and believable, no exaggerated splash.

bite.description: A fish bites the line in a quiet cozy fishing game, small bobber twitch, quick water ripple, subtle fishing line tension, alert but natural, no electronic notification, no melody.

catch_common.description: Common fish caught reward sound for a cozy fishing idle game, small water lift, soft fish flop, tiny pouch or basket rustle, satisfying but understated, natural Foley with a very light warm sparkle, no arcade jingle.

catch_rare.description: Rare fish caught reward sound for a premium cozy winter fishing game, graceful water lift, soft fish movement, delicate magical shimmer like ice crystals, satisfying discovery moment, elegant and restrained, no loud fanfare, no chiptune.

coin.description: Soft coin reward sound for a cozy fishing idle game, a few small old brass coins dropped into a cloth pouch, warm muted clinks, tactile and satisfying, no slot machine, no arcade sparkle.

upgrade.description: Upgrade purchased sound for a calm hand-painted fishing idle game, gentle wooden tool improvement, soft metal fitting click, warm satisfying confirmation, faint magical polish shimmer, premium but quiet, no triumphant music.

ambience_water_loop.description: Seamless looping ambience for a quiet winter riverside fishing spot, slow cold river water movement, tiny ripples near a bank, faint distant wind through reeds, calm empty morning, natural realistic ambience, no birds in foreground, no music, no people.
